role_summary: Senior Director, API & GT Projects, Global Facilities Delivery at Eli Lilly. Structurally like the UN Secretary General for GFD — coordinates Portfolio Programs globally but has no governance authority. Programs share info voluntarily.
pain_themes: Knowledge is async and incomplete — Programs share what they choose
No governance = poor data quality into PortOps
1-1 interviews required to elicit info (high friction)
Needs meeting notes from Town Halls, Newsletters, Steering Committee in central queryable repo
Needs to create reports, presentations, docs from that space
motivations: Report and presentation generation from ingested data
Future state: Unifyer (broader GFD data solution) but needs something now
communication_style: Not yet met directly. All intel from Andy Kennedy.
relationship_notes: Referred by Andy Kennedy (Ceremony). Andy + Scott built PortOps. Ceremony operates as centralized strategic support layer for GFD leadership. Do not contact Scott directly until Joel confirms engagement model and Andy validates problem space.
